props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about HVAC Warranties in {city}

faqs.question: What does an HVAC warranty typically cover?
faqs.answer: Most manufacturer warranties cover defective parts and components for 5-10 years. Extended warranties can cover labor costs and additional parts. We'll help you understand exactly what's covered under your specific warranty.

faqs.question: How do I keep my HVAC warranty valid?
faqs.answer: Most warranties require annual professional maintenance to remain valid. Keep records of all service visits and use licensed technicians for any repairs. Our maintenance plans help ensure your warranty stays in good standing.

faqs.question: Do you offer extended warranty options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer extended warranty plans that go beyond the manufacturer's standard coverage. These plans can cover parts, labor, and even emergency service calls for added peace of mind.
